member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.db_connection_utils.prepare_db_connection_string(nxm.system.extension_services.service_connection_param)
member.summary: constructs SQL connection string for DBEngine

member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.db_connection_utils._prepare_sqlce_connection_string(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: constructs SQL connection string for SQL Compact

member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.db_connection_utils._prepare_sqllite_connection_string(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: constructs SQL connection string for SQLLite

member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.db_connection_utils._prepare_sql_connection_string(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: constructs SQL connection string for SQL Server

member.name: T:nxm.ps.efal.fx.db_connection_utils.db_connection_wrapper
member.summary: wraps SQL connection with capability to collect SQL messages and cancel operation

member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.db_connection_utils.db_connection_wrapper.takeover
member.summary: detach connection (won't be closed by wrapper)

member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.db_connection_utils.db_connection_wrapper._sql_info_message_to_logger(nxm.system.logging.ilog,System.Data.SqlClient.SqlInfoMessageEventArgs)
member.summary: converts sql-error messages to logger entries

member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.ps_transaction._to_isolation_level(nxm.ps.efal.eTransactionBehaviour)
member.summary: translate transaction behaviour to isolation level

member.name: M:nxm.ps.efal.fx.ps_transaction._create_db_context(nxm.system.extension_services.service_connection_param,System.Data.Common.DbConnection,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Action{nxm.ps.efal.idbmodel_builder}})
member.summary: creates new instance of resource of specified type using specified config
